companyName: Aya Gold & Silver Inc. Common Shares
description: Aya Gold & Silver, Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration and development of mineral properties. Its portfolio include Zgounder, Imiter bis, Boumadine, Amizmiz, and Azegour properties. Zgounder, Boumadine, Tirzzit, Tijirit, Imiter bis, Amizmiz, Azegour and Reserves & Resources. The company was founded by Réjean Gosselin on December 19, 2007 and is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
